    B

    Bard - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Support
    Represents the "Bard" Hero Card.
    Bard() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Support.Bard
    Constructs Bard with his base stats and mystical flavor text.
    BaronNashor - Class in NonGui.ListOfObjective
    Represents the "Baron Nashor" Objective Card.
    BaronNashor() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfObjective.BaronNashor
    Constructs a new Baron Nashor objective with its requirements and penalties.
    BaseCard - Class in NonGui.BaseEntity
    The abstract base class for all cards in the game.
    BaseCard(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class NonGui.BaseEntity.BaseCard
    Constructs a new BaseCard with the specified details.
    BattleFury - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.magiccard
    Represents the "Battle Fury" Magic Card.
    BattleFury() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.magiccard.BattleFury
    Constructs a new Battle Fury with its identity and effect text.
    beginChallenge() - Static method in class NonGui.GameUtils.GameplayUtils
    Executes a simple 2d6 dice duel between two parties until a winner is determined.
    BFSword - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.itemcard.ChangeClass
    Represents the "BFSword" Item Card.
    BFSword() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.itemcard.ChangeClass.BFSword
    Constructs a new BFSword with its identity, effect text, and target class.
    BlueBuff - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.itemcard.BuffItem
    Represents the "Blue Buff" Item Card.
    BlueBuff() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.itemcard.BuffItem.BlueBuff
    Constructs a new Blue Buff with its identity and effect text.
    BlueSentinel - Class in NonGui.ListOfObjective
    Represents the "Blue Sentinel" Objective Card.
    BlueSentinel() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfObjective.BlueSentinel
    Constructs a new Blue Sentinel objective with its requirements and penalties.
    boardIsEmpty() - Method in class NonGui.BaseEntity.Player
     
    BoardView - Class in gui
    The main container for the game's graphical user interface.
    BoardView() - Constructor for class gui.BoardView
    Initializes the BoardView with a fixed resolution and base styles.
    BORDER_ACTIVE - Static variable in class gui.board.Theme
     
    BORDER_NORMAL - Static variable in class gui.board.Theme
     
    BOTTOM_BG - Static variable in class gui.board.Theme
     
    BottomHeroesBox - Class in gui.board.field
    Represents the UI container for displaying a player's active heroes on the board.
    BottomHeroesBox(Player) - Constructor for class gui.board.field.BottomHeroesBox
    Constructs a BottomHeroesBox for the specified player.
    BottomPlayerArea - Class in gui.board
    Represents the bottom area of the game board for the local player.
    BottomPlayerArea(Player) - Constructor for class gui.board.BottomPlayerArea
    Constructs the BottomPlayerArea for the given player.
    Braum - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Tank
    Represents the "Braum" Hero Card.
    Braum() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Tank.Braum
    Constructs Braum with his base stats and heart-warming flavor text.
